name: sidebar-rafcom
title: Rafcom Sidebar
description: Sidebar with AppSwitcher (cross-product nav), NavMain (permission-gated), NavUser. Accepts user and navigation data as props.

files.content:
"use client" import { ChevronsUpDown, LogOut, Settings2 } from "lucide-react" import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage, } from "@/components/ui/avatar" import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuTrigger, } from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu" import { SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuItem, useSidebar, } from "@/components/ui/sidebar" export interface NavUserData { name: string email: string avatar?: string } export interface NavUserProps { user: NavUserData onLogout?: () => void onSettingsClick?: () => void /** Label for the settings menu item. Defaults to "Settings". */ settingsLabel?: string /** Label for the logout menu item. Defaults to "Log out". */ logoutLabel?: string } export function NavUser({ user, onLogout, onSettingsClick, settingsLabel = "Settings", logoutLabel = "Log out", }: NavUserProps) { const { isMobile } = useSidebar() const initials = user.name .split(" ") .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase()) .slice(0, 2) .join("") return ( {user.avatar && } {initials}
{user.name} {user.email}
{user.avatar && } {initials}
{user.name} {user.email}
{onSettingsClick && ( {settingsLabel} )} {onSettingsClick && } {onLogout && ( {logoutLabel} )} ) }
